sentence: This privacy policy governs your use of the software application MRT Virtual (“Application”) for mobile devices that was created by Visivalab SL. The Application delivers a multimedia experience inside the Royal Museums of Turin.

section: H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:What information does the Application obtain and how is it used?
H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:What information does the Application obtain and how is it used?
sentence: The Application obtains the information you provide when you download and register the Application. There is no user registration inside the application.

section: H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:What information does the Application obtain and how is it used?
H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:What information does the Application obtain and how is it used?
sentence: The application doesn't collect any information. No user data is sent online.

section: H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:Does the Application collect precise real time location information of the device?
H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:Do third parties see and/or have access to information obtained by the Application?
sentence: No. No user personal info is collected

section: H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:What are my opt-out rights?
sentence: You can stop all collection of information by the Application easily by uninstalling the Application. You may use the standard uninstall processes as may be available as part of your mobile device or via the mobile application marketplace or network.

section: H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:Data Retention Policy, Managing Your Information
sentence: We will retain User Provided data for as long as you use the Application and for a reasonable time thereafter. We will retain Automatically Collected information for up to 24 months and thereafter may store it in aggregate. If you’d like us to delete User Provided Data that you have provided via the Application, please contact us at visivalab@gmail.com and we will respond in a reasonable time. Please note that some or all of the User Provided Data may be required in order for the Application to function properly.

section: H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:Children
sentence: We do not use the Application to knowingly solicit data from or market to children under the age of 13. If a parent or guardian becomes aware that his or her child has provided us with information without their consent, he or she should contact us at visivalab@gmail.com. We will delete such information from our files within a reasonable time.

section: H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:Security
sentence: We are concerned about safeguarding the confidentiality of your information. We provide physical, electronic, and procedural safeguards to protect information we process and maintain. For example, we limit access to this information to authorized employees and contractors who need to know that information in order to operate, develop or improve our Application. Please be aware that, although we endeavor provide reasonable security for information we process and maintain, no security system can prevent all potential security breaches.

section: H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:Changes
sentence: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time for any reason. We will notify you of any changes to our Privacy Policy by posting the new Privacy Policy here and informing you via email or text message. You are advised to consult this Privacy Policy regularly for any changes, as continued use is deemed approval of all changes. You can check the history of this policy by clicking here.

section: H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:Your Consent
sentence: By using the Application, you are consenting to our processing of your information as set forth in this Privacy Policy now and as amended by us.

section: H2:PRIVACY POLICY FOR MRT VIRTUAL > H4:Contact us
sentence: If you have any questions regarding privacy while using the Application, or have questions about our practices, please contact us via email at visivalab@gmail.com.
